revision.comment: 1 revision imported: impoting nglish ikipdia tmplats
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.text:
{{{onright|{{{rhs|}}}}}} {{Cmbox | type = notice | style = padding-bottom:0.5em; | image = {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|module|[[File:Lua-logo-nolabel.svg|44px|Lua logo|alt=Lua logo|link=]]|[[File:Curly Brackets.svg|44px|Template braces|alt=|link=]]}} | text =
{{yesno|1={{{container|}}} |yes=
'''''Note: Please do not add {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|module|modules|templates}} to this category; instead, use one of its subcategories.'''''{{category other|[[Category:Container categories]]}}
}}{{#if:{{{topic|}}}{{{description|}}} |
{{#if:{{{topic|}}} |'''{{#switch:{{lc:{{{type}}}}} |navbox|navigation|navigational|infobox|sidebar|stub|={{ucfirst:{{{type}}}}} templates |module=Modules|#default=Templates}} relating to {{{topic}}}.''' {{{1|}}}{{{description|}}} |
{{{1|}}}{{{description|}}}
}}
}}
{{#if:{{{type|}}} |
The pages listed in this category are {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|module||meant to be}} {{#switch:{{lc:{{{type}}}}} | ambox = [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Article message boxes|article message box (ambox)]] templates | category header | category heading | catheader | cat header | cathead = [[Wikipedia:Categorization|category]] header templates | campaignbox = [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Military history#Campaignboxes|campaignbox]] templates | conversion = templates that perform [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Dates and numbers#Unit conversions|conversions]] | external link = templates providing [[Wikipedia:External links|external links]] | formatting = templates that provide [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Text formatting|formatting]] | function = function templates{{nobold|, i.e. templates that produce text, images or other elements}} | infobox = [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Infoboxes|infobox]] templates | module = [[Wikipedia:Lua|Lua modules]] | meta = [[Help:Metatemplating|metatemplates]] | navigation |navigational |navbox = [[Wikipedia:Navigation template|navigation]] templates | sidebar = [[WP:SIDEBAR|sidebar]] templates | stub = [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Stub sorting/Stub types|stub]] templates | sub = [[Help:Template#Creating and editing templates|subtemplates]]{{nobold|, i.e. templates used by another template or templates}} | timeline = [[Wikipedia:Timeline|timeline]] templates | user | userbox = [[Wikipedia:User templates|user]] templates, including [[Wikipedia:Userboxes|userboxes]] | #default = {{{1|{{{description|}}}}}} | {{{type}}} templates }}.
|
The pages listed in this category are [[Help:Template|templates]].
}}
This page is part of [[:Category:Wikipedia administration|Wikipedia's administration]] and not part of the encyclopedia.
{{#if:{{{ALTTEXT|}}}|
{{{ALTTEXT}}}
}}
Further {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|module|module|template}} category notes
This [[Help:Category|category]] contains pages in the {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|module|[[Wikipedia:Lua|module namespace]]|[[Wikipedia:Template namespace|template namespace]]}}. It should not be used to categorize [[Wikipedia:What is an article?|articles]] or pages in other [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespaces]].

{{#if:{{{help|}}}{{{2|}}} | {{yesno|{{{help|}}} |no={{#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{{2}}}

}} |yes=
{{{help}}}{{{2|}}}

|def=
{{{help}}}{{{2|}}}

}}|
To add a {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|module|module|template}} to this category:
{{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|module|{{Unbulleted list |list_style=padding-left:1.4em; | In the documentation page (usually named "Module:''Name''/doc"), add | {{pad|css=user-select:none;}}{{brackets|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}} | to the section at the bottom of that page. }}|{{Unbulleted list |list_style=padding-left:1.4em; | If the template has a separate documentation page (usually called "{{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|module|Module|Template}}:''template name''/doc"), add | {{pad|css=user-select:none;}}[[{{FULLPAGENAME}}]] | to the section at the bottom of that page. Otherwise, add | {{pad|css=user-select:none;}}<noinclude>[[{{FULLPAGENAME}}]]</noinclude> | to the end of the template code, making sure it starts on the same line as the code's last character. }} }} }}
{{Category other|{{#if: {{{topic|}}}{{{description|}}}||[[Category:Template category with no topic or description]]}}}} }}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:14}} | {{#if: {{{category|}}} | {{{category}}} | {{#ifeq: {{{type|}}} | module | [[Category:Wikipedia module categories]] | [[Category:Wikipedia template categories]] }} }} }} {{Documentation}} [[Category:pages to be overwritten]]

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia template redirects T
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{{onright|{{{rhs|}}}}}} {{Cmbox | type = notice | style = padding-bottom:0.5em; | image = {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|module|[[File:Lua-logo-nolabel.svg|44px|Lua logo|alt=Lua logo|link=]]|[[File:Curly Brackets.svg|44px|Template braces|alt=|link=|class=skin-invert]]}} | text =
{{yesno|1={{{container|}}} |yes=
'''''Note: Please do not add {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|module|modules|templates}} to this category; instead, use one of its subcategories.'''''{{category other|[[Category:Container categories]]}}
}}{{#if:{{{topic|}}}{{{description|}}} |
{{#if:{{{topic|}}} |'''{{#switch:{{lc:{{{type}}}}} |navbox|navigation|navigational|infobox|sidebar|stub|={{ucfirst:{{{type}}}}} templates |module=Modules|#default=Templates}} relating to {{{topic}}}.''' {{{1|}}}{{{description|}}} |
{{{1|}}}{{{description|}}}
}}
}}
{{#if:{{{type|}}} |
The pages listed in this category are {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|module||meant to be}} {{#switch:{{lc:{{{type}}}}} | ambox = [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Article message boxes|article message box (ambox)]] templates | category header | category heading | catheader | cat header | cathead = [[Wikipedia:Categorization|category]] header templates | campaignbox = [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Military history#Campaignboxes|campaignbox]] templates | conversion = templates that perform [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Dates and numbers#Unit conversions|conversions]] | external link = templates providing [[Wikipedia:External links|external links]] | formatting = templates that provide [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Text formatting|formatting]] | function = function templates{{nobold|, i.e. templates that produce text, images or other elements}} | infobox = [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Infoboxes|infobox]] templates | module = [[Wikipedia:Lua|Lua modules]] | meta = [[Help:Metatemplating|metatemplates]] | navigation |navigational |navbox = [[Wikipedia:Navigation template|navigation]] templates | sidebar = [[WP:SIDEBAR|sidebar]] templates | stub = [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Stub sorting/Stub types|stub]] templates | sub = [[Help:Template#Creating and editing templates|subtemplates]]{{nobold|, i.e. templates used by another template or templates}} | timeline = [[Wikipedia:Timeline|timeline]] templates | user | userbox = [[Wikipedia:User templates|user]] templates, including [[Wikipedia:Userboxes|userboxes]] | #default = {{{1|{{{description|}}}}}} | {{{type}}} templates }}.
|
The pages listed in this category are [[Help:Template|templates]].
}}
This page is part of [[:Category:Wikipedia administration|Wikipedia's administration]] and not part of the encyclopedia.
{{#if:{{{ALTTEXT|}}}|
{{{ALTTEXT}}}
}}
Further {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|module|module|template}} category notes
This [[Help:Category|category]] contains pages in the {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|module|[[Wikipedia:Lua|module namespace]]|[[Wikipedia:Template namespace|template namespace]]}}. It should not be used to categorize [[Wikipedia:What is an article?|articles]] or pages in other [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespaces]].

{{{2}}}

|def=

To add a {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|module|module|template}} to this category:
{{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|module|{{Unbulleted list |list_style=padding-left:1.4em; | In the documentation page (usually named "Module:''Name''/doc"), add | {{pad|css=user-select:none;}}{{brackets|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}} | to the section at the bottom of that page. }}|{{Unbulleted list |list_style=padding-left:1.4em; | If the template has a separate documentation page (usually called "{{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|module|Module|Template}}:''template name''/doc"), add | {{pad|css=user-select:none;}}[[{{FULLPAGENAME}}]] | to the section at the bottom of that page. Otherwise, add | {{pad|css=user-select:none;}}<noinclude>[[{{FULLPAGENAME}}]]</noinclude> | to the end of the template code, making sure it starts on the same line as the code's last character. }} }} }}
{{Category other|{{#if: {{{topic|}}}{{{description|}}}||[[Category:Wikipedia template categories with no topic or description]]}}}} }}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:14}} | {{#if: {{{category|}}} | {{{category}}} | {{#ifeq: {{{type|}}} | module | [[Category:Wikipedia module categories]] | [[Category:Wikipedia template categories]] }} }} }} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

The pages listed in this category are {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|module||meant to be}} {{#switch:{{lc:{{{type}}}}} | ambox = [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Article message boxes|article message box (ambox)]] templates | category header | category heading | catheader | cat header | cathead = [[Wikipedia:Categorization|category]] header templates | campaignbox = [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Military history#Campaignboxes|campaignbox]] templates | conversion = templates that perform [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Dates and numbers#Unit conversions|conversions]] | external link = templates providing [[Wikipedia:External links|external links]] | formatting = templates that provide [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Text formatting|formatting]] | function = function templates{{nobold|, i.e. templates that produce text, images or other elements}} | infobox = [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Infoboxes|infobox]] templates | module = [[Wikipedia:Lua|Lua modules]] | meta = [[Help:Metatemplating|metatemplates]] | navigation |navigational |navbox = [[Wikipedia:Navigation template|navigation]] templates | sidebar = [[WP:SIDEBAR|sidebar]] templates | stub = [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Stub sorting/Stub types|stub]] templates | sub = [[Help:Template#Creating and editing templates|subtemplates]]{{nobold|, i.e. templates used by another template or templates}} | timeline = [[Wikipedia:Timeline|timeline]] templates | user | userbox = [[Wikipedia:User templates|user]] templates, including [[Wikipedia:Userboxes|userboxes]] | #default = {{{1|{{{description|}}}}}} | {{{type}}} templates }}.

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 5 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23626449376|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{{onright|{{{rhs|}}}}}} {{Cmbox | type = notice | style = padding-bottom:0.5em; | image = {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|module|[[File:Lua-logo-nolabel.svg|44px|Lua logo|alt=Lua logo|link=]]|[[File:Curly Brackets.svg|44px|Template braces|alt=|link=|class=skin-invert]]}} | text =

{{{1|}}}{{{description|}}}
}}
}}

The pages listed in this category are {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|module||meant to be}} {{#switch:{{lc:{{{type}}}}} | ambox = [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Article message boxes|article message box (ambox)]] templates | category header | category heading | catheader | cat header | cathead = [[Wikipedia:Categorization|category]] header templates | campaignbox = [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Military history#Campaignboxes|campaignbox]] templates | conversion = templates that perform [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Dates and numbers#Unit conversions|conversions]] | external link = templates providing [[Wikipedia:External links|external links]] | formatting = templates that provide [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Text formatting|formatting]] | function = function templates{{nobold|, i.e. templates that produce text, images or other elements}} | infobox = [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Infoboxes|infobox]] templates | module = [[Wikipedia:Lua|Lua modules]] | meta = [[Help:Metatemplating|metatemplates]] | navigation |navigational |navbox = [[Wikipedia:Navigation template|navigation]] templates | sidebar = [[WP:SIDEBAR|sidebar]] templates | stub = [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Stub sorting/Stub types|stub]] templates | sub = [[Help:Template#Creating and editing templates|subtemplates]]{{nobold|, i.e. templates used by another template or templates}} | timeline = [[Wikipedia:Timeline|timeline]] templates | user | userbox = [[Wikipedia:User templates|user]] templates, including [[Wikipedia:Userboxes|userboxes]] | #default = {{{1|{{{description|}}}}}} | {{{type}}} templates }}.

}}|
To add a {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|module|module|template}} to this category:
{{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|module|{{Unbulleted list |list_style=padding-left:1.4em; | In the documentation page (usually named "Module:''Name''/doc"), add | {{pad|css=user-select:none;}}{{brackets|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}} | to the section at the bottom of that page. }}|{{Unbulleted list |list_style=padding-left:1.4em; | If the template has a separate documentation page (usually called "{{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|module|Module|Template}}:''template name''/doc"), add | {{pad|css=user-select:none;}}[[{{FULLPAGENAME}}]] | to the section at the bottom of that page. Otherwise, add | {{pad|css=user-select:none;}}<noinclude>[[{{FULLPAGENAME}}]]</noinclude> | to the end of the template code, making sure it starts on the same line as the code's last character. }} }} }}
{{Category other|{{#if: {{{topic|}}}{{{description|}}}||}}}} }}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:14}} | {{#if: {{{category|}}} | {{{category}}} | {{#ifeq: {{{type|}}} | module | | }} }} }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Container categories]] [[Category:Wikipedia template categories with no topic or description]] [[Category:Wikipedia module categories]] [[Category:Wikipedia template categories]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
